news.t: Pzena Investment Management Enters the Active ETF Space with Launch of Two Exchange-Traded Funds

holdings.infoBox: PZLV is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Humana stock at 6.85%, Baxter International at 4.68%, CVS Health at 4.04%, Dollar General at 3.60%, and Magna International at 3.56%.

overview.description: The Pzena U.S. Large Cap Value ETF (PZLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund provides exposure to the large-cap segment of the US equity market, targeting companies exhibiting value characteristics.  It is an actively managed ETF seeking long-term capital appreciation. PZLV was launched on Mar 31, 2026 and is issued by Pzena.

data.title: Pzena Investment Management Enters the Active ETF Space with Launch of Two Exchange-Traded Funds
